ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISCHANGED(Request_Status__c) && !ISPICKVAL(Request_Status__c, 'Closed - Incomplete') && OR(Opportunity_Stage__c= '6 PO With Channel', Opportunity_Stage__c='7 Closed Won', Opportunity_Stage__c='7 Closed Lost', Opportunity_Stage__c='7 Closed Admin',Opportunity_Stage__c = '0 Nurture' )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can't update the status when related Opportunity is on Stage 6 or Stage 7
